title: Add strict runtime capacity validation for txq/fwd/neighbors/routes per CCP-17 and Kconfig MAX
description: In status_get callbacks and encoders, validate txq_used <= CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_STATUS_MAX_TXQ, fwd_used <= MAX_FWD, neighbor/route counts <= their CONFIG_MAX. Return error or truncate safely. Use BUILD_ASSERT where possible. Follow Zephyr Kconfig.
